label: Draw style
description: Defines a drawing style controlling how tools like the architect pencil or zone-painter render geometric shapes on the map.

uiIconPath.label: UI icon path
uiIconPath.description: Texture path for the architect toolbar button icon. Private in source but present in all shipped DrawStyleDef entries.

drawStyleType.label: Draw style type
drawStyleType.description: C# DrawStyle subclass implementing this style's shape-drawing logic.

drawOutline.label: Draw outline
drawOutline.description: Whether the shape is rendered with an outline.

drawArea.label: Draw area
drawArea.description: Whether the enclosed area of the shape is rendered.

drawShortSideMeasurement.label: Draw short side measurement
drawShortSideMeasurement.description: Whether the shorter side's measurement label is shown while drawing.

canSnap.label: Can snap
canSnap.description: Whether the shape snaps to grid edges while drawing.
